rationale: Review 1's finding is grounded in the diff (lines 57-60) and material for proof-quality, as acting on it replaces the hand-rolled ⟨1, by simp⟩ + unnecessary have/rw with IsNilpotent.zero or direct simp [IsUnipotent], producing a shorter, more idiomatic proof reusing the library fact; Review 2's approve leaves the PR with an avoidable non-idiomatic proof.
